phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si convalida il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see kon-VAH-lee-dah eel bee-LYET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: At the yellow machines on platforms.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che parte il treno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh PAR-teh eel TREH-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto per Milano, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah eel bee-LYET-toh per mee-LAH-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to validate the ticket
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si convalida il biglietto?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see kon-VAH-lee-dah eel beel-YET-toh?

responses.english: In the yellow machines before the platforms.
responses.phonetic: NEL-leh mak-kee-NET-teh JAL-leh PREE-mah day bee-NAH-ree.
responses.local: Nelle macchinette gialle prima dei binari.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, da quale binario parte il treno per Firenze?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, dah KWAH-leh bee-NAH-ryoh PAR-teh eel TREH-noh per fee-REN-tseh?

responses.english: You'll see it on the monitors inside.
